info.name: MIDAZ
info.description:
This is a swagger documentation for the Midaz Ledger API. This API combines all Onboarding endpoints (organizations, ledgers, accounts, assets, portfolios, segments), Transaction endpoints (transactions, balances, operations, asset-rates), and Metadata Index endpoints in a single service.

**IMPORTANT**: This collection requires the **MIDAZ Environment** to be selected for proper functionality. Please ensure you have imported and selected the MIDAZ environment before using this collection.
